entry.title: What's new in SAP Asset Performance Management 2404
entry.content:
Welcome to our latest release blog for SAP Asset Performance Management 2404*. We're excited to share new improvements including improvements to ease rule creation, yet more convergence of strategy and maintenance execution with SAP S/4HANA integration, UI improvements and new analytics data sources for strategy objects. Let's dive in.

*for simplicity I may refer in the following blog to SAP Asset Performance Management as APM. The blog topics are structured by APM business capability.

 

Asset Health Monitoring

Highlight Outliers with Color Coding in App "View Technical Objects (Inspections)" 

In our quest to continually enhance user experience, we’re pleased to introduce color-coded thresholds and icons in the View Technical Objects (Inspections) application based on the underlying indicator configuration. This offers a more intuitive and user-friendly approach to inspecting your technical objects with easy-to-interpret visual color cues that correspond to the configured threshold settings. As such, users don’t just see the value and unit of the measure but can also understand at a glance how these figures stack up against the established indicators. For example, consider a technical object, such as a pressure vessel with a thickness level of 600mm. If this value is within the good range according to the indicator configuration, it will be shown in green. However, if the value dips below the threshold – say to 400mm, which is within the red range – the visual representation will change to red, alerting the user instantly about the need for attention. This new feature is applicable to all indicators with set thresholds.

Additionally, in the table header, instead of just displaying the characteristic or indicator, the position and the indicator category are also shown for user convenience. See the video:

Enhancing Rule Editor Flexibility: From Fixed to Dynamic Values in Notification Output Fields

In the existing rule editor, there's a feature allowing the creation of notifications in SAP S/4HANA as rule outputs. Until now, it was only possible to specify fixed values for the notification output fields Planning Plant, Task List Type, Task List Group, and Task List Group Counter during the design time of a rule.

Now you can dynamically insert values for these fields from class characteristics and attributes assigned to the affected Technical Objects​. This greatly enhances the overall flexibility of the system as it eliminates the need for fixed values for each rule setup. Consequently, if your rules involve multiple Technical Objects that use dissimilar task lists, you're no longer limited to a fixed task list value. Instead, the applicable task list can be dynamically derived based on the particular characteristics and attributes of each Technical Object. This breakthrough ultimately results in a more adaptable and efficient rule design process. You can have much more generic rules and create much less rules.

Asset Reliability Engineering

Converge strategy and execution - recommendation implementation by creating task list

​You can now implement reactive maintenance recommendations as task lists in S/4HANA Maintenance Management from the Implement Recommendations application and view them all in a comprehensive list view. 

Once you've reviewed the recommendations, you can initiate the implementation process by choosing the status 'Implementation in Process.' A 'Create' button has been incorporated for the easy creation of task lists. This newly created task list header, marked as 'Created' in SAP S/4HANA, will conveniently be linked to your chosen recommendation.

The task list in SAP S/4HANA can now be enriched with additional fields (such as Main Work Center, Usage, etc.) and operations as needed. When the task list in SAP S/4HANA is set to Released, you can manually change the recommendation status to Implemented, offering you complete control over the progress of your tasks.

This enables seamless integration between asset strategy and maintenance management, and reliability and maintenance planning. Above all, it provides a clear track of your maintenance work's reliability, keeping you updated on your recommendations' implementation status.

Select and assign technical objects to recommendations from strategy assessment for classes

​Technical objects define, in part, the 'operating context' of a strategy assessment for classes. The process of assigning these technical objects to recommendations is a crucial one, and used to be a time-consuming task, requiring navigating to each recommendation to assign the technical object.

We have therefore introduced a new feature allowing the selection and assignment of multiple technical objects in one go.

Now, instead of assigning technical objects to each recommendation individually, the process is significantly simplified. A user can select multiple recommendations within an ‘operating context’ and assign technical objects to them all at once.

Further enhancing usability, the user can filter the list of technical objects based on different criteria such as class, plan details, profile, and characteristic value. Selection can be made based on the relevancy of the recommendation.

A notable feature is that this bulk assignment of technical objects doesn't override existing assignments. If a recommendation already has some technical objects assigned, the new ones will be added to the list, not replace them.

Deliver APM Strategy Objects as Data Sources for SAC

We've provided three crucial views from the strategy assessment for classes as data sources within our analytics dashboard. This enhancement paves the way for analytics administrators and reliability engineers to:

  1. Generate comprehensive analytics views that reveal strategy assessments for classes and recommendations to the SAC (SAP Analytics Cloud).
  2. Synthesize insightful and meaningful analytics by leveraging these data sources in conjunction with existing data.

This improvement is expected not only to amplify the potential for critical insights but also to enhance customer experience by allowing for the creation of more significant and relevant analytics.

Until now, the dashboard included data sources from FMEA RCM master data, conditionality, and transaction data. Now we introduced data source objects for strategy assessments for classes. We achieved this through available views in the strategy assessment for classes that now include class assessment details like assessment name, class, catalog profile, planning plan detail, source, and assessment ID and status, among others.

We also added the class assessment and assigned failure data class assessment. This improvement integrates failure data codes assigned to any class assistant into a relational table, storing catalog type code, code group, and the order assigned to the assessment ID, in addition to the operating context.

Additionally, the enhancements provide assigned operating context details of an assessment, the context characteristics of each operating context, and corresponding operating context characteristic values.

For the users' convenience, strategy assessments can now be associated with all existing data sources. This feature enables users to conduct their analyses based on the class assessment name and operating context name, further simplifying the user experience.

In this sample dashboard you can observe a distribution of assessments based on their status represented in a pie chart. The chart depicts the percentage of created, released, and in process assessments. Additional drill-down features provide further details such as the assessment and class name associated with a particular assessment and catalog profile. The user is free to customise the columns to best suit their analytical needs.

These improvements not only enhance the analytics dashboard's capabilities but also provide users with a more robust, comprehensive, and user-friendly experience.

 

Keep in touch

Here's a quick reminder how to keep in touch with all things APM:

  • Check out all forthcoming webcasts here. If you register for an IAM webcast, you will be automatically subscribed to our IAM Community Engagement Newsletter. Join us on May 22nd 4pm CET for the 2405 webcast!
  • Watch the replay of our recent webcasts.
  • Subscribe to What's New on the SAP Help Portal
  • Submit or vote for the improvement you would like to see in the SAP Continuous Influence session

See you again soon for the 2405 release update!

entry.title: Re: API_PRODUCT with Internal Number Assignment
entry.content: Any updates on this issue ? Still not possible to import Product Master data with internal number range via API? Kind regards

entry.title: Principle propagation for non SAP sender in PI 7.50 AEX
entry.content:
Hello expert

we have a typical requirement for Java front-end to call ECC backend, REST - PI - ECC. However they require user authorization (Authority Check) in backend based on the user who calls the API. Normally we use ECC service user to call the ABAP proxy from PI, to allow using end user calling ECC from frontend, the only option is Principle propagation.

I've done lots of research on PP, none of them provided definite answer.

From SAP help (https://help.sap.com/doc/saphelp_scm700_ehp02/7.0.2/en-us/81/6d7e8093134d4f8417a2e780a3393f/frameset.htm), it seems that PP is only possible between SAP systems, as it mentioned you'd need to configure Trusted Relationship between Sender and PI, and between PI and backend, those configuration are SAP specific.

So my question is: is it possible to use PP between non SAP frontend and SAP backend? if yes, how to configure it? (including configuring Trusted Relationship in non-SAP system / application)

thank you so much

Jayson

entry.title: Re: How is creating delivery quantity of scheduling agree...
Re: Non cumulative measure in Datasphere
entry.content:
Hi,

I tested it with your example data and it works fine. I only had to adjust the time frame because it is different with your data vs. Screenshots

entry.title: What regular expressions are available to be used in Secondary Mapping Value conversion from SAP-EC
entry.content:
Good afternoon,

We need to replicate data from SAP ERP to Employee Central, but the data quality is quite a mess.

There are national ID from Molga 39 country (Chile) in different formats,

12.123.123-1

12123123-1

1231231231

 

The valid format would be this:

__.___.___-_

(the first one of the three above)

so i am trying to use value conversion this way,

according to the manual it should work

 

 

 

but is showing errors when replicating in se38

 

it is supposed to find the "-" if any and replace it by an <nbsp> space, the same with the points (\.) and after all, applying the correct format __.___.___-_

but it looks like seq number 1 and 2 (replace using patterns with string/ec field) don´t work if together only work if i delete one of them and leave the other. 

Maybe i need just to write everything in the same line and using a regular expressions as if i was writing ABAP code, but regular expressions like this [.-] are not working in this value conversion.

Therefore i would like to know if there are limitations for the regular expressions in this value conversion tool or they should work the same as if i was using ABAP code.

 

Thanks in advance

regards

entry.title: Re: Connect to ABAP environment using RFC
entry.content:
Hi Gustaf, 

I guess it makes sense that you have a look a the tutorial for using JCo in Cloud Foundry with ABAP systems running in SAP's cloud solutions. How to configure destinations is described in the RFC Destinations topic. Also have an eye on the restrictions.

Best regards,
Markus

entry.title: Re: Exploring GraphQL and REST for SAP Developers
entry.content: for Ui5 development, REST API might be a better option than GraphQL, however, if we can consider using  GraphQL for real-time data aggregation for SAP HANA Extended Application Services (XS), SAP Cloud Platform, or even SAP Business Technology Platform (BTP)  GraphQL might be a good alternative my main goal is to highlight the possibilities and advantages to using different APIs with SAP solutions 🤗

Image 2. Template configuration in SSCV2

Image 3. Email received by account contact

I have to believe this is an issue for a number of SAP users as I think your crafting the workaround points out...

did you check? I_SupplyDemandItemTP

Erol

entry.title: Re: Exploring GraphQL and REST for SAP Developers
entry.content:
my main goal is to highlight the possibilities and advantages to using different APIs with SAP solutions

Got it, and I like your blog 🙂 

My point is that despite GraphQL's appeal, adding it to your stack isn't for free. You need a "middleware" that provides the GraphQL endpoint and delegates calls to the underlying REST/OData/... APIs, which you need to configure, deploy, and operate, adding to your TCD and TCO.

Thank you for your guidance David

1459805 - Error F5702 or RW022 / RW033 Balance in Transaction Currency when releasing SD invoice to accounting - SAP for Me

Thanks & regards

Sanil Bhandari

we are trying to insert Project Responsible name on CDS to view all project managers in the report, but the element we add on CDS doesn't actually work. we joint it with the WBSElementBasicData and we opened the element as semantic element with "text", but still doesn't work. 


Does anyone know how to make it work ?

entry.title: Re: CMS Database - AP_Objects.AP_Filesize

entry.title: Re: CMS Database - AP_Objects.AP_Filesize
entry.content: I mistakenly posted my question on the wrong user community site.  This is a question about a field in APOS Insights database.

entry.title: Re: INT-15852 > Default Port Value Setting in Integration...
entry.content:
Hi,

Integration centre does not support port other than 22 for any new integrations. This is due to security reasons.

HXM Security Governance requires the use of the standard port (SFTP/22) for SFTP type of connection. Using a non-standard port provides no real security protection and is only an example of Security Through Obscurity (https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Security_through_obscurity) which has been thoroughly discredited as a viable security strategy.

Having a non-standard port assignment increases HXM's risk (e.g., increased configuration complexity, increased management, etc) and on the other hand does not decrease the risk to the customer. Targeted attacks will mostly start with reconnaissance, part of which any service running on any port will be discovered.

Alternatively, IP whitelisting at customer’s SFTP side and other effective security controls (e.g., anti-brute force mechanisms, multi-factor authentication, etc) adds real security and renders concern of increased attack surface invalid.

Please let us know if you need any further information.

Thank you,

Regards,

Pavana

entry.title: How can I get employee image from SAP C4C odata?
entry.content: How can I get employee image from SAP C4C odata?

entry.title: Tile not showing correct amount and currency
entry.content:
Hi,

Some App tiles are not showing correct ammount and currency, this problem started after a upgrade of version, before upgrade the information were as expected showing amounts and currency BRL.

After entering the App the information are correct, amount and currency expected.

And every other information and values are correct, in portuguese and BRL

Examples of App with problem:

Total Receivables - F1748

Overdue Receivables - F1747

Future Receivables - F1744

The login in to the system is made in Portuguese.

Someone kwons how to fix this or what can we do about it ?

 

Carol

entry.title: Re: Fiori Elements Internal Navigation

entry.title: Re: How to fetch follow on order in SAP PM
entry.content:
Hi,

You cannot remove the Item, if it is 1:1.

Instead you can set the Maintenance Plan status Inactive and deletion flag set.

Regards

Terence

entry.title: Re: how to show description order in print out
entry.content:
Hi,

Can you share the existing Print layout, you are using ?

In Standard form it will be there, if the print form is customized, then you need modify the program to include the order description

Regards

Terence

entry.title: Re: ABAP Trace to PlantUML Sequence Diagram
entry.content:
Hi Nomssi, great blog, I need exactly as described to reverse engineer the sequence diagram. But I am stucking of getting it running: inlude and enhancements are active. The pop I see when I run the method .

Now how do I get the trace into the diagram?

Start transaction SAT -> Evaluate -> Double Click on a measurement; on the next screen press F8

(I have no F8 functionality) Do I need to install JNet OCX? 
Or is there another way to run this? Please advice.

entry.title: Re: CDS-Views in Datasphere not visible
entry.content:
Hello @madeleine_schaefer 

someone had a similar question like you: https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/cds-views-not-visible-in-datasphere/qaq-p/12736904

You can see the CDS View directly, when you connect it via a Replication Flow or a Dataflow.

BR, Martin

entry.title: Re: Forwarding agent as a generic use
entry.content:
Yes. 

It is possible and may be beneficial (depending on Customer requirements) in some cases. 

For example at one of my client, the Forwarder partner is mandatory in Delivery document. The forwarder is determined from a Custom table based on Route, Ship to Party and many other non-standard factors. The Deliveries are created via Background Jobs and some time the Forwarder is not available in Custom Table. 

In such a case we default a Dummy Forwarder to facilitate the Delivery to be created. 

What is the exact question you have for the Dummy Forwarder? 

Thanks,

entry.title: Re: ABAP CDS Hierarchy Definition - Not able to Preview
entry.content:
Hello @muthuhana 

Have you checked SU53 directly after executing the preview?

Might be there is another CDS view in the underlying views, from which yours is selecting data?

BR, Martin

entry.title: Re: SAP B1 mobile app approvals are not showing in List
entry.content: Dear Team, We have checked the solution provided by you, but still the same error. Please arrange for a remote session and guide us to resolve an issue. Regards,

entry.title: Re: SAC - Use a value from another table/datasource in ca...
entry.content:
Hello @axel_ 

I think the easiest way in SAC, if you have an import or even a planning model... is to directly write the required key figure into the same model ... either via file-upload or via data action.

Then you can create calculated key figures and use those.

I would not have any better idea to do it in a SAC story.

BR, Martin

entry.title: Re: Fiori Elements Internal Navigation
entry.content:
Hi,

maybe this documentation can help you: Configuring Internal Navigation - Documentation - Demo Kit - SAPUI5 SDK
But do you know where "keys1" come from ?
Is that defined in the EntitySet Apuracoes?

entry.title: Firebase Cloud Messaging API v1 invalid token handling
entry.content:
It seems that the new implementation of the Firebase Cloud Messaging API v1 is not handling invalid tokens. According to Firebase documentation, if response is UNREGISTERED (error 404), then it means that token is invalid.

https://firebase.google.com/docs/cloud-messaging/manage-tokens

For the legacy API there was a handling implemented in SAP Marketing by checking tokens before sending messages and marking as "invalid" those that Google ID API identified as such.

Now it seems that it does not care and is not making changes to tokens based on a response of the new API v1.

entry.title: Re: Mastering SAP Build Process Automation: Insights from a functional consultant
entry.content:
Hi ,

Informative blog . thanks for sharing on SAP Build Process Automation . 

Regards ,

entry.title: Re: SAP BTP SDK for iOS 10.0 is now available
entry.content:
Hi @AlexGiguere,

The upcoming version 10.0.3 is scheduled for external release in a few weeks (Q2 2024). We are releasing this patch despite the new major version 24.4 because some customers may not be ready to transition to a new major version just yet. This way, customers can still benefit from the minor improvements included in patch releases.

Thank you for the feedback on release notes. We will ensure to update the notes along with our releases from now on.

entry.title: Re: Marketplace Updates not working
entry.content:
Hello Marihirvi, I was just wondering what the timeline might be to fix the above issue. 

Thanks, Nick

entry.title: Re: ABAP CDS Hierarchy Definition - Not able to Preview
entry.content:
I'm sorry, I'm no BTP expert... but I would assume the solution is similar to an ABAP system.

In PFCG you need to create or enhance a role with which you can read the table.

I guess as of now, you cannot read it in SE16, either, right?

entry.title: Re: Best practice how to deal with action parameters in R...
entry.content:
My idea was to use $filter instead of the action parameters, so the action call would become

*/sap/opu/odata/sap/ZSC_IO_ODS_TO_FNR_SB/execute?changes_x_days_back='5'&$filter=Plant eq '1003' or Plant eq '1004'&sap-client=400

Not sure how to achieve this with RAP, back in the days of manual OData service implementation the DPC method would receive a parameter io_request or io_tech_request_context that would allow accessing the filter value and have it converted into a deep structure with nested ranges tables.

entry.title: Re: Origin group in ECP
entry.content: Does item category G ( overheads)allow origin group in ECP ? Any pointers is appreciated.

entry.title: SAP AI Launchpad: Dead process after 2 hours
entry.content:
Hi All,

I have created a basic execution, it ended up in Dead state with below status:

{
"details": [
{
"container_name": "main",
"exit_code": "",
"last_log_messages": "Error pulling container main logs",
"message": "Back-off pulling image ***/house-price:02\"",
"pod_name": "efdb960a3aff0aad-mycodeblock1-3924317824",
"ready": false
},
{
"container_name": "wait",
"exit_code": "",
"last_log_messages": "...-05-02T12:10:***\" level=info msg=\"Alloc=5477 TotalAlloc=13200 Sys=17383 NumGC=58 Goroutines=7\"time=\"2024-05-02T12:15:***\" level=info msg=\"Alloc=5457 TotalAlloc=13303 Sys=17383 NumGC=61 Goroutines=7\"",
"message": "",
"pod_name": "efdb960a3aff0aad-mycodeblock1-3924317824",
"ready": true
}
],
"workflow_info": [
{
"exit_code": "",
"id": "efdb960a3aff0aad",
"message": "child 'efdb960a3aff0aad-3924317824' failed",
"name": "efdb960a3aff0aad",
"outputs": "",
"phase": "Failed",
"type": "Steps"
},
{
"exit_code": "",
"id": "efdb960a3aff0aad-3924317824",
"message": "Step exceeded its deadline",
"name": "efdb960a3aff0aad[0].mypredictor",
"outputs": "",
"phase": "Failed",
"type": "Pod"
},
{
"exit_code": "",
"id": "efdb960a3aff0aad-885417400",
"message": "child 'efdb960a3aff0aad-3924317824' failed",
"name": "efdb960a3aff0aad[0]",
"outputs": "",
"phase": "Failed",
"type": "StepGroup"
}
]
}

Regards,

Niharika.

entry.title: Re: Milestone Billing - SAP SD
entry.content: Thanks for the inputs. We are not using Project Services in the current project. But it is still possible to create milestone billing without PS right? If so, where can we maintain those billing dates and when I manually give billing dates in the billing plan tab it is automatically placed in billing block and billing type FAZ (Down Payment Request). But I would like to see how billing block can be removed by system automatically and with billing type F2?

entry.title: Error installing ABAP 7.5.2. Assertion failed: Unable to generate a new password for database login
entry.content:
I am trying to install ABAP 7.5.2 using VMWARE on suse linux. I have followed the steps mentioned in below link:

Installing AS ABAP 7.52 SP04 Developer Edition on VMWare and Linux 

Installation of SAP server failed with below error: Assertion failed: Unable to generate a new password for database login 'sa'. Refer to trace file sapinst_dev.log for further information.

It may be an issue with expired sybase key. But where to get and how to use that key ?

Below link ask for hardware ID which i don't know how to get it: https://go.support.sap.com/minisap/#/minisap

Once i get the key, where to place it?

Below is the detailed log for your reference. Can anyone help with the solution ? @julieplummer20 any pointers here?

********************************Log Starts *********************************************************************

INFO       2024-05-02 01:24:18.257 (root/sapinst) (startInstallation) [syuxcfile.cpp:216] id=syslib.filesystem.removedFile CSyFileImpl::removeEx(ISyFSErrorHandler * pErrorHandler)
Removed file /sybase/NPL/startase_reset_sa.

ERROR      2024-05-02 01:24:18.258 (root/sapinst) (startInstallation) [CInstallerCallBackImpl.cpp:259] id=ind-rel.ind-os.ind-db.assertionFailed errno=CJS-00030 CInstallerCallBackImpl::abortInstallation()
Assertion failed: Unable to generate a new password for database login 'sa'. Refer to trace file sapinst_dev.log for further information.

ERROR      2024-05-02 01:24:18.259 (root/sapinst) (startInstallation) [iaxxbjsmod.cpp:83] id=modlib.jslib.caughtException errno=MUT-03025
Caught ESAPinstException in module call: Assertion failed: Unable to generate a new password for database login 'sa'. Refer to trace file sapinst_dev.log for further information..

ERROR      2024-05-02 01:24:18.754 (root/sapinst) (startInstallation) [CSiStepExecute.cpp:1104] id=controller.stepExecuted errno=FCO-00011 CSiStepExecute::execute()
The step syb_step_reset_db_passwords with step key |offlineadjustment_dialogs|ind|ind|ind|ind|0|0|offlineadjustment_db_post|ind|ind|ind|ind|db_post|0|syb_rename_db_post_dia|ind|ind|ind|ind|syb|0|NW_SYB_DB_REN|ind|ind|ind|ind|syb2|0|syb_step_reset_db_passwords was executed with status ERROR (Last error reported by the step: Assertion failed: Unable to generate a new password for database login 'sa'. Refer to trace file sapinst_dev.log for further information).

INFO       2024-05-02 01:24:20.720 (root/sapinst) (startInstallation) [syuxcpath.cpp:441] id=syslib.filesystem.creatingFile CSyPath::createFile()
Creating file /tmp/sapinst_instdir/NW73/SBC/STANDARD/INSTANA.XML.

INFO       2024-05-02 01:24:21.371 (root/sapinst) (startInstallation) [syuxcpath.cpp:441] id=syslib.filesystem.creatingFile CSyPath::createFile()

entry.title: How to create a BRF+ rule to check date?
entry.content:
Hi experts!

I am facing with a BRF+ issue which is about to validate a date.
The date cannot be more than 1 year from now.

For example:
The date is: 10.04.2026 and it must fail because is more than 02.05.2025.

I've tried to create an expression but did not succed.

Thanks for your help! 🙂

entry.title: Re: Hybris - Adding Service product to main product (Pric...
entry.content:
Please provide with more context. Is it a B2C? How users are supposed to pay (eg. Customer Initiated Transaction / Merchant Initiated Transaction)? How do you want to update the orders (Manually with Backoffice / OCC API / Integration API) ? Any ERP integration?

Regarding the products, check if the Configurable Bundle can be used in your scenario.
https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_COMMERCE/9d346683b0084da2938be8a285c0c27a/8b6eec0286691014a041e59dc69dc185.html 
For example, Standard Oil Change and Synthetic Oil change can be the "starter products".  You are actually selling services, so, you'll have to add services to the main products. Prices can be defined with Price Rules https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_COMMERCE/9d346683b0084da2938be8a285c0c27a/6e13d7cbfe7941ce83c8f81585cfc08f.html 

You'll also need to customize the order process.

entry.title: Re: Connecting Multiple Primaries to each other
entry.content:
Hi Jim,

This a common scenario in our business.  We use a dated Cross Reference to link the original agency to the new Parent Agency as shown below where SafeCare is the new parent agency.

Additionally, every agent that points to the previous agency's Payee record should now be pointed to SafeCare. This relationship will direct all business after the merger to the new Parent Agency.

For transactions that are reprocessed or are dated prior to the merger date, a Global Transaction default will be used to override the normal Vendor assignment and pull teh new vendor from Merged Agency Cross reference that was created. There are a few other "nuances" that need to be addressed, but these 2 changes will address 95% of the scenarios and route payment to the new agency.

Let me know if more info is needed.

 

Thank you!

Phillip Butts

entry.title: Re: Hybris - Adding Service product to main product (Pric...
entry.content:
It is for B2B Customers.

So here example scenario:

Cost of Oil change - 0$

Based on the vehicle & work involved, they charge the customer for an oil change.

This could be because of various reasons ( Shipping charge, requested site visit to change the oil)

In this case, oil change is added to order and when setting the order status to completed. Then change the price and replicate to ERP to raise the invoice. (This is done in backoffice)

Note:

List price is 0$

Final Transactional price could vary based on effort involved.

entry.title: Re: CDS-Views in Datasphere not visible
entry.content: Hello Martin, thank you for your answer. Do you know the reasoning behind there being no access via Remote Tables? We don't quite understand why some CDS-Views are not reachable via remote tables and some, like ISDSALESORG, are reachable perfectly fine. Regards, Madeleine

entry.title: Re: A Guide to Calling RFC Function Modules from SAP Integration Suite
entry.content:
Hello @karstenvoigt,

if you set language in a destination, then it is permanently set, and you dont have option to change it dynamically.

If there would be http call (which isnt unfortunatelly), then we would be able to call service with parameter

sap-language=<lang code>

 Only workaround which came in my mind is to create several destinations - each one with different lang parameter and create logic in iflow, which will call RFC with the right destination.

entry.title: Re: The 2022 SAP Extended Warehouse Management Advent Calendar
entry.content:
"SAP Note 3078938 “APIs available in Extended Warehouse Management” gives an overview of APIs which are available for use in Extended Warehouse Management for local system calls, that is, APIs with no remote interface call scenarios from other systems."

If you want us to get ready to go to the cloud - you have to ensure as many APIs as possible is accessible for remote interfaces calls - else we will just put more cement in the onprem solutions as devolopment and roll out does not stop ....

#Giv us APIs NOW!

entry.title: Re: Connect SAP Business Application Studio and SAP S/4HA...
entry.content: Your user needs to be assigned to the SAP_A4C_BC_DEV_UID_PC and SAP_CORE_BC_EXT_TST business catalogs, see Develop an SAP Fiori Application UI.

entry.title: SAP Build Process Automation -Automatic Creation of Sales Orders from Excel
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

 

As a part of SAP BTP Trial version, we are working on activating Build process automation bot -Automatic Creation of Sales Orders from Excel (4G5)

The target instance on which the BOT is deployed is S/4HANA on premise system, We are referring to below SAP link 

https://help.sap.com/docs/IRPA_S4HANA/1ba1de4bdbae4d3b85c71d1408c95f66/9e4f182ff2ae4eaa94eabd5d3a67acbd.html?q=Automatic%20Creation%20of%20Sales%20Orders%20from%20Excel

I have the following questions

1) What  should be entered as SYSTEMURL_ODATA ?  Sample value mentioned in product documentation is https://<System>-api.<domain>/sap/opu/odata/sap . Which api should be mentioned here. Can some one help with the exact string ?

 

2) For on -premise system what is meant by  technical user ?

 

3) For on -premise scenarios does API_SALES_ORDER_SRV/A_SalesOrderInformation needs to be activated specifically and any users assigned ?

 

Could some one point to step by step details for on-premise systems ?

 

Thanks & Regards

Amit Kulkarni

entry.title: EWM-WCS IDOC /SCWM/WMTOID01 seems not providing syntax to create a difference WT
entry.content:
Hello EWM experts,

in our scenario, we use a EWM-WCU connected storage type (like described here from @Gunter ) to connect an external warehouse management system (WMS) in "black box" setup (as described here)

"Black box" means that external WMS is full blown and does the complete inventory management on quant level, meaning WMS keeps all SAP EWM stock identifying fields (like /SCWM/DE_MATNR, /SCWM/DE_CHARG or /LIMEB/STOCK_CATEGORY,...)

In this scenario, the external WMS can "move stock around" by sending a /SCWM/WMTCID01 (/SCWM/WMTORD) IDOC to EWM. This IDOC will create a WT in EWM.

But what should external WMS do, if it likes to reduce the stock quantity ? (e.g. as a result of a PI count difference in external WMS)

In EWM itself, a WT can be confirmed with an exception code similar to "DIFW" leading to a difference analyzer entry.

But neither in segment /SCWM/E1LORI001 is EXCCODE(BUSCON+EXEC_STEP) available nor is in ABAP code of /SCWM/IDOC_INPUT_WMTORD and the IDOC definition of /SCWM/WMTOID01 the handling of segment /SCWM/E1LEXCP forseen.

In ERP-WM, it was straight forward to create a immediately confirmed TO (by WMTOID01 IDOC) to storage type 999

How should that work equivalently in EWM ?

Thanks & best regards,
 Matthias

... and yes, we use EWM-MFS to drive our warehouses by default, but this one uses EWM-WCU

entry.title: Re: A Guide to Calling RFC Function Modules from SAP Integration Suite
entry.content:
Hi,

thanks for the answer. 

I was afraid of the answer 🙂 We have 10 different ERP systems and currently have to support 5 languages. Copying the destinations is somehow not nice, but it is the last chance. Unfortunately, I can't wait out the problem until all ERP systems have been migrated to S/4.

Regards

Karsten

entry.title: SAP Signavio Extraction Filter for M2S JCDS
entry.content:
Hello experts,

I would like to make my extraction of the JCDS table a little smaller because I only use the numbers of the field OBJNR with the beginning OR* in the transformation. I would also like to use a filters in the extraction. But I have problems with the current filter, because no rows are returned.

my attempt was: OBJNR = 'OR*'

Does anyone have an idea how I can solve this?
Greetings Niels

Siba

entry.title: Re: SAP Enable Now Help Topic Pane Colour
entry.content: Use the Parameter uiBg. Refer this link for more info.

entry.title: Re: Initial Release of SAP Analytics Cloud Just Ask
entry.content:
Hi @francois_imberton 

couple of questions:

1. By when are other languages fully supported?
E.g. by when will the titels / description use the search language instead of English? By when will german umlauts ä,ö,ü correctly displayed and not displayed with ?? as currently

2. In rules I can select for my planing model as version value only actual version. I want to direct all searches to the plan version but it is not showing up. Bug?

3. Is somewhere a sample question list - what to ask to get what kind of result

4. Would have expected faster response. Sales_Sample model. Question:"sales per year" takes 5 sec to come back with the chart. Is this the normal performance?

Thanks and best regards
Axel

entry.title: 'Use Enable Now App Launcher' not available in Admin / server setting.
entry.content:
Hello,

Interface has changed since the video 'Session 1 - accessing Enable Now resources' was made.

Administration / server Settings / do not contain anymore the section 'Miscellaneous', so I can't find the option Use Enable Now App Launcher.

Can someone help me to set this option ?

Thank you !

entry.title: CSGORoll Promo Code
entry.content:
A unique opportunity to get free bonus😍

Here's the CSGORoll promo code to get +5% on your first deposit: CSGOBETTINGSS‼️

How to use promo code?

  1. Go to the official CSGORoll website.
  2. Log into your account via Steam or Register if you're a new user.
  3. Find the "Rewards" section.
  4. Insert the CSGORoll promo code "CSGOBETTINGSS" into the appropriate field.
  5. Input your email and confirm according to the instructions you'll get.
  6. Enjoy your bonus - +5% on your first deposit🔥

entry.title: Re: Release Question: Comparing Previous Months
entry.content:
The specific release for that functionality has not been identified yet but is on the roadmap.  Currently, it is anticipated that it will be some time in 2025 though.

The functionality being considered is to allow the user, while reviewing a specific Payout, to search for and select another Payout, and generate comparison information.  The data to be compared would include:

  • Overall Duration
  • Task Level Duration
  • All Payout Statistics that are being captured by the Payout Statistics task (currently displayed on the summary Payout screen)

entry.title: Re: Is Custom Business Configurations (F4579) intended to...
entry.content: Thanks for the reply Patrick. Is there a way to maintain SPRO/IMG activity via a Fiori App - as we want to move away from the GUI?

entry.title: Explore how SAP's IT is Driving Innovation and Transformation
entry.content: Join this live webcast to peek behind the scenes and uncover how SAP's IT unit fuels the company's own transformation journey. Explore how SAP leverages its own technology to unlock business potential. Delve into the pivotal role of this cutting-edge IT unit in fostering innovation, embracing new technologies, and future-proofing the company. Experience the essence of SAP's uniqueness through the Discover SAP YouTube series and get a glimpse of what's in store at SAP Sapphire 2024.

entry.title: Re: Best practice how to deal with action parameters in R...
entry.content: I tried it by adding this to the URL, but I get back the message "System query options '$expand,$filter,$orderby,$skip,$top,$skiptoken,$inlinecount,$select' are not allowed in the requested URI". It looks like the action is only accepting parameters that we defined and that is also what I experienced. I looked again at the data we have available while debugging, but io_request and io_tech_request_context are both not available (see below image). If we would have had them, I know I would be able to convert it easily.

entry.title: Handling Speed Losses in SAP Digital Manufacturing
entry.content:
Introduction

SAP Digital Manufacturing provides comprehensive OEE calculation capabilities out of the box, where Performance Losses play an important role. The main purpose of the Performance KPI, is to compare the actual production speed to the designed production speed. In other terms, it's about becoming aware of speed losses. Simply put, Speed Loss means the "production time lost to shop floor equipment or process running below standard rated speed".

In this blog post, I will cover the process of handling Speed Losses in SAP Digital Manufacturing, including how they are created, tagged and monitored.

Prerequisites

  • You have maintained OEE Reason Codes for 'Speed Losses' using Manage OEE Reason Codes.
  • You have maintained Standard Rates using Manage Standard Rates.
  • You have created a POD using POD Designer including Speed Loss List plugin.

Creating

Speed Loss entries are automatically created when production is slower than the pre-defined standard rate.

Meaning that, if the standard rate configured for a given material and resource combination is set as 1 piece by 1 min, and SFCs take longer than 1 min to start and complete, Speed Loss entries are automatically created and shown in POD via Speed Loss List plugin.

* Speed Loss List plugin opens by default filtered by the current POD context (Work Center, Resource, Order, etc) of the SFC selected. You can enable ‘Show Filters’ in POD Designer for Speed Loss List plugin, so you can see and change filter criteria accordingly:

Tagging

When a Speed Loss entry in Speed Loss List plugin is selected, all relevant details like context, tagged and untagged speed loss time and existing reason code tagging are shown. From here, workers can then Tag or Delete speed loss items further.

When tagging, workers can select a Reason Code and Duration.

This process can be repeated multiple times, enabling different Speed Loss durations to be tagged with different reason codes.

Once tagged, speed loss items reason codes can also be changed or deleted.

Monitoring

Performance KPI and Speed Loss details can be seen and monitored in detail via Line Monitor POD, including speed loss reason codes and durations.

See Performance KPI and Speed Loss for more details.

Experiencing SAP Digital Manufacturing

You can have a glimpse and experience several aspects of SAP Digital Manufacturing via the Interactive Value Journeys below:

Discrete within SAP Digital Manufacturing and S/4HANA Cloud
Process Industry within SAP Digital Manufacturing and S/4HANA Cloud
Tool Management within SAP Digital Manufacturing
Resource Orchestration within SAP Digital Manufacturing
Production Process Design within SAP Digital Manufacturing
Shop Floor Orchestration with SAP Digital Manufacturing
Time Tracking within SAP Digital Manufacturing
SAP Digital Manufacturing for Insights
Nonconformances Processes within SAP Digital Manufacturing


Do you like this post? Please let me know in the comments section what you think. Any feedback is highly appreciated.

Or, if you have any questions, please check SAP Community Q&A Area, or comment down below.

Thanks,
Manoel Costa

entry.title: Re: Optimized Story Experience - SAP SuccessFactors People Analytics
entry.content:
Hi @Dharmin_Thakkar 

thanks for this great blog.

Is there an end date for the classic story experience? Do all reports currently created in the classic story experience have to be moved?

Thanks and best

Nicole

entry.title: Re: To get records for last 120days(4 Moths) in BODS
entry.content: Hi Julian, Thank you very much for providing me the logic, will check and confirm...Regards, Siba

entry.title: Re: To get records for last 120days(4 Moths) in BODS
entry.content: Hi Dunncrew, Thank you for answering, May I please know what value should I give for yyyy.mm.dd before > and after > , Regards, Siba

entry.title: Re: Broadcast Freight settlement documents charge calcula...
entry.content: Unfortunately, that did not solve the issue. I discovered more with some testing automatic carrier selection is performed. The top rank carrier has the charge tab populated with its freight agreement and rate sheets. If they submit with the lowest bid and will the charges calculate taking in adjusted amount subtracting from their original calculated rate to the amount submitted as the bid. If any other carrier wins the bid their calculation sheets are not taken into account and are removed with only the ADJ line that shows their bid amount. When the FSD drops with that it is re calculated at FSD creation and adds the winning bid with their calculated rate.

entry.title: Problem with CDS Scalar function for workday calculation
entry.content:
Hello,

I have built a CDS scalar function, with which I want to add workdays to a date using the SQL function "ADD_WORKDAYS".

Therefore I created a Scalar function with the following coding:

define scalar function /IFMSCM/ADD_WORKDAYS
  with parameters
    StartDate: abap.dats,
    NumberOfDays: abap.int4,
    FactoryCalendar: abap.char( 2 )
  returns abap.dats

After that I created the Implementation Reference and the corresponding class. The source code of the class contains the SQL function:

  METHOD execute BY DATABASE FUNCTION
                   FOR HDB
                   LANGUAGE SQLSCRIPT
                   OPTIONS READ-ONLY.

    result = to_dats(add_workdays (factorycalendar, startdate, numberofdays));

  ENDMETHOD.

As you can see in the source code, I wrapped the add_workdays function with a conversion to internal format, because it handed back the date in external (i.e. 2024-05-02). Normally I would expect to always work with the internal 8 character display (20240502) while I am not already on the UI level.

So I wrapped it with the to_dats function and handed the return parameter of the scalar function back as abap.dats.

Here is the integration into the CDS view

      /IFMSCM/ADD_WORKDAYS( StartDate => PReq.DowntimeFrom, NumberOfDays => cast( '1-' as abap.int4 ), FactoryCalendar => Plant.FactoryCalendar ) as ReschedulingDate,

This is working when I test the service, but it is displayed in the internal way:

So the next step was to try casting the field to abap.dats, with the following coding (on the higher CDS level):

      cast(case
        when ReschedulingDate >= $session.system_date then ReschedulingDate
        else '        '
      end as abap.dats )              as ReschedulingDate,

When I do this, the direct data preview of the CDS View looks good, with the correct date display, but the list report is no longer working, as soon as I select the data I get the following error messages:

Does anyone know, how I can achieve the external output on the UI, but can still use it in the CDS view as any other dats element?

Thanks and greetings

Felix

entry.title: Re: Non cumulative measure in Datasphere
entry.content: Thanks for pointing it out. My bad, I had the wrong reporting period than the data.

entry.title: Re: Read an asynchronous messaging with a Timer Event
entry.content: Hi @ag3silaus, no it doesn't work because request reply doesn't support a jms adapter

entry.title: RKSV (Austria) - new certificates by A-Trust / error when using
entry.content:
Dear Colleagues,

A-Trust is the default provider for certificates for the RKSV-Plugin in Austria since years. But with the new certificates (the only one available at the moment) we cannot use the plugin for signing because we get an error message "signature card not available". This error has been tested with different version of CCO (including the newest one) and with different usb-readers, so the issue can be isolated in the new certificate. As far as we know there is a new processor type on it, but it is the default standard in Austria.

Who could provide urgent support, to solve this issue.

kind regards

Rüdiger

entry.title: Re: Managers can now create Employee Central Quick Actions for Positions
entry.content: very nicely explained

entry.title: Re: Read an asynchronous messaging with a Timer Event
entry.content: Hi riprasadsbhat, I think that will work to me, I'm going to use the deploy/undeploy, I only don't know how to undeploy it with the api, I didn't see a specific route

entry.title: Re: Rules in substitutions & validations SAP PS
entry.content: You can pre-define Rules and then use them in a Sub or Val steps.  This lets you reuse the rules and not have to recreate the step repeatedly.

entry.title: Re: How to learn SAP BTP
entry.content:
One additional link - as you say "BTP" but don't say which parts.
SAP Discovery Center has "missions" that can be used to learn about the various service instances.  If you find yourself thinking about "real" instances, the where/how to standup/cost, etc.  Discovery Center also has information related to that and also some reference architecture information.

Best Regards, Wallace

entry.title: Re: Milestone Billing - SAP SD
entry.content:
Currently in Public Cloud the Enterprise Project Milestones do not link to a Sales Order Item to create the Billing Plan similar to how it works in Private Cloud/On-Prem.  For Public Cloud it is on the roadmap to have this functionality.

Also, in Public Cloud there are only WBS elements, Network Activities are not there.

entry.title: Exchange Rate Conversion for Company Code Currency
entry.content:
In standard S/4HANA systems, M is the standard translation currency type for company code currency translation, and it cannot be altered for any specific company codes:

There is a legal requirement for specific countries to use rates provided by the national banks. It means, instead of usual Reuters rates (scope item 1S4) updating the exchange rate type “M”, a new source for foreign currency exchange rates will be needed in our current project for those countries.

We have followed this SAP documentation: https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blogs-by-sap/currency-conversion-with-prescribed-exchange-rates/ba-p/12845598.

We proceed with all customizing suggested; however, this S/4 HANA Public Cloud implementation is a worldwide project and for countries that use the same currency (example: EUR, GBP) and requiring different sources for exchange rate declarations, Alternative Exchange Rate solution would not work.

We will have many rollouts to different countries, using the same currency (Example: GBP, EUR, USD), in case more than 2 countries use alternative exchange rate types, it would work only for one country. In this case, alternative exchange rate is a huge problem to be used because multiple countries use the same currency as their company code currency but use different sources for exchange rate conversions alternative exchange rate usage will only work for 1 of them, not for all.   

Example: Serbia, Turkey, Bulgaria have a legal requirement to use their own national banks as an exchange rates provider, and Reuters is setup for type M as a default provider for the countries already active in the system. By adding a new country we will be obliged to exclude this countries' ratios from Reuters. At some point, this will make a mess and will be hard to monitor.

Please provide us any tips, tricks, advices.

entry.title: Re: Project Budget control in balance sheet account for a...
entry.content: Budget values can only be applied against P&L accounts.  Project costs first post to a P&L account against the project then during settlement they are posted to the Balance Sheet account.  The budget has already been controlled on the first posting.

entry.title: Re: CS11 transaction
entry.content: You do not need to write a custom Z report. SAP has determined that the Pricing (they call it Pricing not Costing!) info is protected by default. You have to apply an Snote to a modern S4/Hana 1909 or later system to get CS11/12/13 to display Pricing. And once the Snote is applied you have to enable pricing in the View option.

entry.title: Re: SAP Datasphere: PowerBI Direct Query via HANA Cloud Calculation Views
entry.content:
Thanks you so much @jaigupta !

Do you know how this could be done? Is there a blog or whatever? I've been looking for information for a long time but I can't find anything.

Thanks for your answer!

José Antonio Funes Pérez

entry.title: Re: Recurring Schedule of Performance Forms for New hires
entry.content:
Hi Krisztina,

We have tried to do the same for a customer and we faced the same challenge; we tried several options until we decided to go with this option, it is not completely automated, but it helps

1. Go to "Form Template Settings" and setup the fixed dates (I am assuming this is where you have your start date, and end/due date for February 28th) and check for "Prevent forms from being created with overlapping date ranges (this applies to all templates with this configuration enabled)". These three dates and this option enabled are very important for the next steps!!!

2. Go to "Manage Scheduled Reviews" and Schedule a New Launch and select this combination of settings:

- Step 1: select your template

- Step 2: One-time, later and select for example, the first day of the next month (June 1st)

- Step 3: you will see in the "Review Period" that you can select "Dates configured for form" and that the system will respect your end date and due date.

- Step 4: Scroll down and go to the bottom of the "launch forms" window and select "Only create for users who don’t have an existing form with an End Date" and type in the start date (maybe 01/01/0000) and the end date you configured in the step one (February 28th, next year).

- Step 5: Scroll up and select "Gruop of Employees" and choose "Find employees by filters". Select criteria and select every department or every division, etc.

Step 6: Click "Launch" and confirm the scheduled job. Make sure to talk to your implementation partner to check that the "mass create forms" job is configured in Provisioning (you do not have access as a customer).

Then, repeat the process of scheduling new launches for July 1st, August 1st, Sep 1st and every month until the process is being closed. For example, for our customer, we only launch forms until October 1st. for employees that were hired in September and are being rated whith 4Q data.

Make sure to check this link to a step by step whith images. Hope this helps!

Mercedes Morales, SAP SuccessFactors Performance & Goals Consultant

entry.title: Re: Near-Zero Downtime Maintenance for High Availability / Disaster Recovery (HA/DR) SAP Java System
entry.content:
Nice Blog, easly understand the PO system process.

 

thanks

entry.title: Re: RAP : Error messages behaving differently
entry.content:
Hello,

I had this error too.

For me, the reason was my validation was on a child so it is mandatory to filled the path with the root parent.

After that, message popover and state area works well.

As you can see in my code, another problem was my %is_draft from key was 00 (I don't know why maybe an impact from my determination before) and here it wants 01 (logic I'm in draft when I save) and 00 for root. After it propose well the link in message popover.

Best regards.

entry.title: Re: SAP Tips and Tricks
entry.content: Thanks so much, I was about to create a new post asking how to go to the transaction code, this and much more you gave!

entry.title: Re: Why SAP killed Appgyver and made everything worse?
entry.content: Can we have content of https://forums.appgyver.com/ back????

entry.title: Re: ABAP Matrix (AFM/ALM)
entry.content:
Thanks again for sharing this! It was featured in our story here: https://boringenterprisenerds.substack.com/i/143794060/its-abap-matrix-fam

I hope some day we'll get "ABAP Living" magazine too. 🙂
